ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "order_no" INTEGER /* Order number assigned to the trade */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the counterparty involved in the trade */,
  "deal_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of deal (e.g., Accumulator, Autocall) */,
  "trade_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (buy or sell) */,
  "nominal_value" REAL /* Nominal value of the trade */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade matures */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the trade */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the trade (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the trade */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the trade */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_counterparty_id FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty_id") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_deal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("deal_type_id") REFERENCES deal_types ("deal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counterparties" (
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counterparty */,
  "counterparty_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the counterparty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the counterparty */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the counterparty (e.g., AAA, BBB) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Business sector of the counterparty (e.g., banking, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_types" (
  "deal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deal type */,
  "deal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the deal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deal type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the deal (e.g., derivative, equity) */,
  "complexity_level" TEXT /* Complexity level of the deal (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (ISO 4217) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the currency */,
  "is_base_currency" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the currency is the base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., confirmation letter, settlement details) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_documents_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, risk manager, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., trading, risk management) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
